change_request: Counties SEO structure: county data file (lib/counties.ts), translations for countiesOverview and countyPage sections in EN+ES, ContactForm defaultCounty prop for form pre-fill, counties overview page with county grid, county template page for 9 counties (Denver, Adams, Arapahoe, Jefferson, Douglas, El Paso, Larimer, Weld, Boulder). All pages are static content rendering components — no business logic, algorithms, or data transformations requiring unit tests. Error handling is implemented via notFound() guards on invalid lang and county slugs.
acceptance_criteria: lib/counties.ts exists with 9 county data entries
countiesOverview key exists in EN and ES translations
countyPage key exists in EN and ES translations
ContactForm accepts defaultCounty prop and uses it as select defaultValue
Counties overview page renders county grid with links to county slugs
County template page exists at app/[lang]/counties/[county]/page.tsx
generateStaticParams returns all 9 counties x 2 langs
Invalid county slug triggers notFound()
County page passes content.name as defaultCounty to ContactForm
Both /en/ and /es/ routes covered
No modifications to globals.css or api route

llm_analysis.assessment: The changes match the change request by implementing the SEO structure for counties, translations, and static content rendering components.

risks: app/[lang]/counties/[county]/page.tsx:generateStaticParams - Incorrect params generation could lead to missing pages.
components/layout/contact-form.tsx:ContactForm - Default county prop handling could affect form pre-fill behavior.
lib/counties.ts:getCounty - Incorrect data retrieval could lead to rendering errors.

llm_analysis.notes: Error handling is implemented via notFound() guards for invalid language and county slugs.
No API or contract changes detected; changes are primarily related to static content rendering.

llm_analysis.recommendation: Although unit tests are not required for static content, consider adding integration tests to verify page rendering and navigation.
